claim: Agent builds an analytics dashboard using Container + CSS grid + Chart + StatCard + DataGrid without reaching for layout wrappers.
prompt: Build a Dashboard.svelte with: (1) four stat cards in a responsive grid, (2) a line chart spanning two grid tracks, (3) a DataGrid with 5 columns and 10 rows. Use Container for content width, raw CSS grid in <style>, and @container queries for responsiveness. Do not import Stack/Box/Grid.

acceptance_checks.description: Uses CSS grid (not flex), @container queries, and DryUI data components.
